metadata.title: Connect Now — International Student Integration in France
metadata.description: The mobile companion that guides international students through admin steps, connects them with a peer community, and supports them from aspiration to settling in France.

common.tagline: Your guide. Your community. Your France.

aspirant.label: The Aspirant
aspirant.headline: Prepare your project without getting lost
aspirant.description: Applications, Campus France, Parcoursup, visa — Connect Now supports you even before you leave.

partant.label: The Departing
partant.headline: Everything's approved — now the essentials
partant.description: Housing, bank account, insurance — the final weeks before departure, mapped out for you.

nouveau.label: The Newcomer
nouveau.headline: Welcome — we're here for your first 12 months
nouveau.description: Residence permit, CAF, social security, network — ask your questions, move forward with your community.

etabli.label: The Established
etabli.headline: You know the way — share it
etabli.description: Become a mentor, share your experience, and help newcomers succeed in their integration.

hero.title: You don't have to navigate alone.
hero.subtitle: Connect Now is the local friend you wish you had from day one.

stages.title: Where are you in your project?
stages.description: Connect Now adapts to every stage — from preparing your application to becoming a mentor.

problem.title: international students. Three struggles at once.
problem.description: These problems aren't independent — they reinforce each other and create vulnerability at the most critical moment.
problem.stat: international students in France every year

admin.title: Opaque admin steps
admin.description: CAF, social security, residence permit, CVEC — a maze without local reference points.

isolation.title: Isolation from day one
isolation.description: No network, no trusted peers, no one to ask the small questions that block everything.

info.title: Scattered information
info.description: Between inaccessible official sites and saturated WhatsApp groups, nobody knows where to look.

pillars.title: Three pillars. One app.
pillars.description: Connect Now combines what no one else brings together: utility, human connection, and credibility.

guide.title: Specialized AI guide
guide.description: Nebula knows the nuances of French admin for international students. Ask your question, get the right answer — no jargon.

community.title: Peer community
community.description: Thousands of students like you sharing, helping each other, and moving forward together — filtered, reliable, human.

journey.title: Personalized journey
journey.description: From aspiration to settling in, a timeline that adapts to your stage and reminds you what really matters.

compare.title: Not them. Us.
compare.description: We don't replace institutions — we fill what they don't cover.

aspirant.quote: I was waiting for my visa without knowing where to start. Connect Now gave me a clear checklist — I stopped panicking.
aspirant.author: Amara, Senegal

nouveau.quote: CAF, prefecture, social security… I asked my questions at 11pm and got an answer from someone who'd been through the same struggle.
nouveau.author: Lin, China

etabli.quote: Today I help newcomers in the app. It's exactly the companion I wish I'd had when I arrived.
etabli.author: Karim, Morocco

cta.title: The companion you wish you had from day one.
cta.subtitle: Free. No in-app purchases. Install and move forward.

meta.title: Student Journey — Connect Now
meta.description: From aspiration to settling in: discover how Connect Now supports you at every stage of your project in France.

hero.title: Four stages. One companion.
hero.description: Wherever you are — Connect Now adapts its content, community, and reminders to your exact stage.

cta.title: Find your stage in the app
cta.subtitle: Onboarding places you in the right spot from the very first open.

cta.title: Activate your journey in the app
cta.subtitle: Download Connect Now and select your stage for tailored support.

meta.title: The Aspirant — Prepare your project | Connect Now
meta.description: Applications, Campus France, Parcoursup, visa: Connect Now supports you before you leave.

hero.title: Prepare your project without getting lost
hero.description: You're building your application, waiting for your visa — Connect Now prepares the ground during this waiting phase.

challenges.0: Understanding Campus France and procedures based on your country of origin
challenges.1: Managing visa wait anxiety without knowing if you're missing a step
challenges.2: Finding reliable info on studying in France, drowned in contradictory sources

steps.0: Personalized checklist based on your country and study level
steps.1: Nebula AI guide for your pre-departure procedure questions
steps.2: Community of aspirants going through the same wait as you

aspirant.app: On install, select "Aspirant" to unlock your pre-departure journey with tailored reminders and resources.

meta.title: The Departing — Final weeks before departure | Connect Now
meta.description: Visa approved: housing, bank, insurance. Connect Now maps your critical steps before departure.

hero.title: Everything's approved — now the essentials
hero.description: The weeks before departure are the most stressful. Connect Now has mapped them so nothing catches you off guard.

challenges.0: Finding housing remotely without a local network
challenges.1: Opening a bank account and getting insurance before arrival
challenges.2: Organizing your arrival: transport, first day, documents to carry

steps.0: "X weeks before departure" timeline with clear priorities
steps.1: Actionable housing, bank, and insurance guides
steps.2: Connect with students already on the ground in your host city

partant.app: Switch to Departing mode in the app: your timeline updates with critical steps to finalize before your flight.

meta.title: The Newcomer — Your first 12 months | Connect Now
meta.description: Residence permit, CAF, social security, network: Connect Now supports you during your first 12 months in France.

hero.title: Welcome — we're here for your first 12 months
hero.description: You just arrived or you've been here a few months. Every step matters — Connect Now guides you through.

challenges.0: Validating your residence permit and understanding prefecture timelines
challenges.1: Submitting CAF and social security requests without missing a deadline
challenges.2: Building a social network when you don't know anyone locally

steps.0: Nebula answers your admin questions 24/7, without jargon
steps.1: Local community by city and university
steps.2: Automatic reminders so you never miss a critical deadline

nouveau.app: Newcomer mode activates your integration timeline: residence permit, CAF, social security, CVEC — step by step, at the right time.

meta.title: The Established — Become a mentor | Connect Now
meta.description: Been here over a year? Share your experience and help newcomers succeed with Connect Now.

hero.title: You know the way — share it
hero.description: Your experience is gold for a Newcomer. Become the companion you wish you had when you arrived.

challenges.0: Wanting to give back to the community that helped you
challenges.1: Turning your experience into a useful resource for newcomers
challenges.2: Staying connected to your city's student diaspora

steps.1: Badges and recognition for your community contribution
steps.2: Access to events and established peer groups

etabli.app: Enable Established mode to become a mentor, share your tips, and support students who are arriving.

meta.title: Features — Connect Now
meta.description: Nebula AI guide, peer community, and personalized journey: discover Connect Now's three pillars.

hero.title: Three pillars. One app.
hero.description: Connect Now brings together what no one else combines: a specialized guide, an authentic community, and a journey that evolves with you.

guide.title: Nebula AI Guide
guide.description: AI trained on French admin steps for international students — not a generic ChatGPT.

points.1: Contextualized to your stage and city

community.title: Peer community
community.description: The best of a trusted WhatsApp group — without the noise, rumors, and false info.

points.0: Groups by city, university, and origin
points.1: Moderated mutual help and verified content

journey.title: Personalized journey
journey.description: A smart timeline that knows where you are and what's next.

cta.title: Try Connect Now for free
cta.subtitle: Install the app and see all three pillars in action.

meta.title: Why Connect Now — Connect Now
meta.description: Discover what sets Connect Now apart from Campus France, WhatsApp, and ChatGPT.

hero.title: Not an institution. Not a WhatsApp group. Not a generic AI.
hero.description: Connect Now fills the gap no one covers: human, specialized, continuous support for international students in France.

0.title: Built by an international student, for international students
0.description: This isn't a product designed "for" you from an office — it's built "by" someone who lived exactly what you're going through.

1.title: Specialization vs generalization
1.description: Nebula knows the nuances of French admin. ChatGPT doesn't. Campus France only covers pre-departure.

2.title: Reliability vs noise
2.description: WhatsApp groups are useful but unfiltered. Connect Now combines human connection with verified, actionable content.

3.title: Continuous support
3.description: From application to settling in — over 12 months. Not just a PDF guide before departure.

cta.title: Join the community
cta.subtitle: Thousands of students moving forward together — not alone.

meta.title: Testimonials — Connect Now
meta.description: Real journeys, real voices: discover how Connect Now helps international students in France.

hero.title: They were in your shoes. They move forward with Connect Now.

steps.2: Select your stage — Aspirant, Departing, Newcomer, or Established
steps.3: Connect Now adapts your journey immediately

meta.title: About — Connect Now
meta.description: Our mission, values, and vision for international student integration in France.

hero.title: The local friend you wish you had from day one.
hero.description: Connect Now was born from a simple observation: no one should navigate integration in France alone.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Guide, connect, and empower every international student — from before arrival until fully settled in.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: Make every international student succeed in their integration — not by luck, but because they had the right tools and people around them.

0.title: Authenticity
0.description: We speak truth. We've lived what we solve.

1.title: Empowerment
1.description: We make students autonomous, not dependent.

2.title: Radical inclusion
2.description: Regardless of origin, city, or budget.

3.title: Reliability
3.description: Every piece of content is verified, clear, and actionable.

4.title: Community
4.description: A peer's greatest value is their lived experience.

cta.title: Be part of the journey
cta.subtitle: Join Connect Now and move forward with your community.

meta.title: Universities & institutions — Connect Now
meta.description: The platform built for international relations offices: track, support, and measure your international students' integration.

hero.title: Your international students deserve a welcome that matches your ambition.
hero.description: Connect Now structures what was informal — and makes integration measurable.

problem.title: Informal integration doesn't scale.
problem.description: Your IR teams juggle emails, WhatsApp, and spreadsheets — with no visibility on your international students' real progress.

0.title: No post-arrival visibility
0.description: Once enrolled, you don't know if they've validated their residence permit, obtained CAF housing aid, or found housing.

1.title: Disproportionate support load
1.description: The same questions keep coming back — CAF, social security, prefecture — exhausting your welcome teams.

2.title: Unmeasurable integration
2.description: You can't manage what you don't measure. Informal pathways produce no actionable data.

platform.title: A dashboard built for international relations
platform.description: Connect Now for institutions: the tools to track, support, and better integrate your international students.

0.title: Journey tracking
0.description: See where each student stands in their integration — from aspiration to settling in — in real time.

1.title: Alerts & friction points
1.description: Identify students stuck on a critical step before it impacts their studies or stay.

2.title: Institutional content
2.description: Share your welcome resources directly in the app — at the right moment, in the right context.

3.title: Integration indicators
3.description: Clear metrics to drive your welcome policy and justify your investments.

benefits.title: An ecosystem, not just another tool

0.title: Two-sided network effect
0.description: The mobile app drives student adoption. The web platform gives you visibility. Both reinforce each other.

1.title: Reduced IR workload
1.description: Nebula answers recurring questions 24/7 — your teams focus on complex cases.

2.title: Stronger welcome image
2.description: Offer your international students concrete support — not just a PDF booklet.

steps.0: Initial contact and scoping of your welcome needs

cta.title: Become a Connect Now partner
cta.subtitle: Let's discuss supporting your international students.

meta.title: Support — Connect Now
meta.description: Need help? Contact the Connect Now team.

hero.title: We're here to help
hero.description: Questions about the app, your journey, or your data? Write to us — we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

general.title: General support
general.description: For any questions about using the app or website.

privacy.title: Personal data
privacy.description: To exercise your GDPR rights or ask privacy-related questions.

0.question: Is the app free?
0.answer: Yes, Connect Now is 100% free for students. No in-app purchases.

1.question: How do I contact support?
1.answer: Send an email to support@connectnow.fr describing your request. Include your stage (Aspirant, Partant, etc.) if relevant.

2.question: How do I exercise my data rights?
2.answerPrefix: Write to privacy@connectnow.fr. See also our
